cockatrice_carddatabase.cards:
Davy Jones
UB 3UB 5 Legendary Creature - Pirate Horror Creature 3/3
2 Indestructible, boss Cumulative upkeep {1}. (At the beginning of your upkeep, put an age counter on this creature, then sacrifice it unless you pay its upkeep cost for each age counter on it.) When Davy Jones create a black artifact token named “Davy Jones’s Heart” with “When this token leaves the field exile Davy Jones.”. 2BB, {T}: amass Zombie Pirates 1.
Chernabog, the Pure Evil
B BBBBBB 6 Legendary Planeswalker - Chernabog Planeswalker 6
1 Boss Whenever a player sacrifices a permanent, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. +1: Sacrifice a permanent. +0: Create three 1/1 black Devil creature tokens with flying and “This creature can’t block.”. -1: Sacrifice three permanents. -6: Target opponent sacrifices a permanent. Chernabog, the Pure Evil can be your commander.
Jafar
UB 2UB 4 Legendary Creature - Human Wizard Creature 3/3
2 Boss Instant and sorcery spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. If Jafar would be destroyed in combat, you may pay {2}, transform Jafar instead. If Jafar would be destroyed outside of combat, transform Jafar instead.
transform front Jafar, the Genie
Captain James Hook
BR 3BR 5 Legendary Creature - Human Pirate Creature 4/5
2 Haste Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) When Captain James Hook attacks, it deals 3 damage to attacked opponent. When Captain James Hook blocks, it deals 1 damage to target attacking creature.
Sephiroth
B 5B 6 Legendary Creature - Angel Soldier Creature 7/5
2 Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) During your upkeep choose one — • Zantetsuken: Sephiroth gets first strike until end of turn. • Darkness Orbs: Create three 1/1 black Darkness Orb creature tokens, tapped and attacking. Destroy them at the end of turn. • Meteor: Sephiroth deals 2 damage to all creatures. • Heartless Angel: Other creatures toughness becomes 1 until end of turn unless opponents pay {3}.
Ursula
U 3U 4 Legendary Creature - Octopus Wizard Creature 4/4
2 Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) Splash damage 1 (When this creature deals damage to a creature, it deals 1 damage to other creatures that player controls.)
Hades
B 3BB 5 Legendary Creature - God Creature 3/5
2 Ward {3} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {3}.) Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) Whenever you gain life, target opponent loses that much life. 3B, {T}: Target creature has lifelink until end of turn.
Scar
BG 2BG 4 Legendary Creature - Cat Creature 2/4
2 Trample Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) Sacrifice a creature, {T}: Create a food token.
Pete
B 2B 3 Legendary Creature - Dog Creature 4/2
2 Flashback 3B (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)
Maleficent
B 3BB 5 Legendary Creature - Human Wizard Creature 2/5
2 Boss, ward {3} When Maleficent enters the battlefield, scry 3. If Maleficent would be destroyed in combat, you may pay 6 life, transform Maleficent instead. If Maleficent would be destroyed outside of combat, transform Maleficent instead.
transform front Maleficent Dragon Form
Dr Finkelstein
B 1B 2 Creature - Human Horror Creature 0/2
2 1B, {T}: Create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token with decayed. (It can’t block. When it attacks, sacrifice it at end of combat.)
Oogie Boogie
B 2BB 4 Legendary Creature - Horror Creature 3/4
2 Boss When Oogie Boogie attacks, roll a d20. 1|You lose 2 life. 2-10 | You lose 1 life. 11-19|You lose 1 life. Draw a card and target opponent discards a card. 20|Draw 2 cards and Oogie Boogie takes 4 damage. If Oogie Boogie would be destroyed in combat, you may sacrifice a land, transform Oogie Boogie instead. If Oogie Boogie would be destroyed outside of combat, transform Oogie Boogie instead.
transform front Oogie's Manor
Shan Yu
BG 2BG 4 Legendary Creature - Human Soldier Creature 4/3
2 Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) Whenever Shan Yu deals damage to an opponent, put an assault counter on Shan Yu. {T}: Remove tbd (maybe 2) assault counters from Shan Yu, deal 10 damage to target player.
Clock-o-dile
UB 1UB 3 Legendary Enchantment Creature - Saga Creature
2 I: Sacrifice target creature. Gain 3 life. II: Target creature cannot block. III: Create Tick-Tock the Crocodile, a legendary 4/4 blue and black Crocodile creature token with trample, haste and “When this creature attacks, put a sentence counter on target creature.”
Mother Gothel
B 1B 2 Legendary Creature - Human Creature 1/3
2 When Mother Gothel enters the battlefield, exile target creature an opponent controls until Mother Gothel leaves the battlefield.
Queen of Hearts
BR BR 2 Legendary Creature - Human Noble Creature 1/1
2 Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) XB/RB/R, {T}: Create X 1/1 red or black soldier creature tokens. When Queen of Hearts leaves the battlefield destroy all soldier token you control.
Clayton
G 2G 3 Legendary Creature - Human Mercenary Creature 3/3
2 Range (When this creature attacks it takes no damage from creatures without range or reach.) Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.)
Hydra
G XG 1 Legendary Creature - Hydra Creature 0/0
2 Hydra enters the battlefield with X +1/+1 counters on it. If damage would be dealt to Hydra, prevent that damage. Put a +1/+1 counter on Hydra for each 1 damage prevented this way.
Cerberus
BG B/GB/GB/G 3 Legendary Creature - Dog Dog Dog Creature 3/3
2 Menace (This creature can’t be blocked except by two or more creatures.) Sacrifice a creature: Cerberus gains double strike. Sacrifice two creatures: Cerberus gains triple strike.
Pain and Panic
B 1B 2 Creature - Demon Creature 2/1
2 {T}: Sacrifice Pain and Panic, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card into your graveyard.)
Magic Mirror
U 2U 3 Artifact Creature - Golem Creature 2/1
2 {T}: Scry 2. {2}, {T}: Draw a card. {3}: Add a shield counter on Magic Mirror until your next upkeep. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.)
Hydros, the Ice Titan
U 2U 3 Legendary Snow Creature - Avatar Creature 2/3
2 Menace Other Avatar creatures you control get +1/+1. {T}: Tap target creature.
Sabor
G 2GG 4 Creature - Cat Creature 5/2
2 Haste, trample 1G: Sabor fights target creature you don’t control. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)
Pyros, the Lava Titan
R 2R 3 Legendary Creature - Avatar Creature 1/4
2 Menace Other Avatar creatures you control get +1/+1. Creatures your opponents control get -0/-1.
Stratos, the Wind Titan
W 2W 3 Legendary Creature - Avatar Creature 3/2
2 Menace Other Avatar creatures you control get +1/+1. Whenever an Avatar you control dies, Stratos, the Wind Titan gains its abilities.
Lythos, the Rock Titan
G 2G 3 Legendary Creature - Avatar Creature 4/1
2 Menace, trample Other Avatar creatures you control get +1/+1.
Flotsam and Jetsam
U 1U 2 Creature - Fish Ally Creature 2/2
2 Double strike (This creature deals both first-strike and regular combat damage.) 4U, {T}: Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it.
Shenzi, Banzai and Ed
G 2G 3 Creature - Dog Creature 1/3
2 Triple strike (This creature deals first-strike, regular, and last-strike combat damage.) {2}, {T}: Sacrifice a food token, put a +1/+1 counter on Shenzi, Banzai and Ed.
Jafar, the Genie
BR
0 Legendary Creature - Djinn Creature 5/5
2 Indestructible, boss When Jafar, the Genie enters the battlefield, create a 0/1 artifact creature token named “Iago & the Black Lamp” with flying and “When this token leaves the field exile Jafar, the Genie.”. 1R, {T}: Jafar, the Genie deals 3 damage to any target.
transform back Jafar
Maleficent Dragon Form

0 Legendary Creature - Dragon Creature 6/6
2 Flying, menace Boss (When this creature enters the battlefield destroy other permanents with Boss you control.) Splash damage 2 (When this creature deals damage to a creature, it deals 2 damage to other creatures that player controls.)
transform back Maleficent
Jolly Roger
R 2R 3 Artifact - Vehicle Artifact
1 Islandwalk, range {T}: Add {R} or {B}. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or greater: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)
Oogie's Manor
B
0 Planeswalker - Oogie Boogie Planeswalker 5
1 Boss +1: Oogie’s Manor deals 3 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets. +1: Oogie’s Manor deals 3 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets. +0: Add B. -1: Create two Heart tokens with mana value 2.
transform back Oogie Boogie
Flying Dutchman
U 2U 3 Artifact - Vehicle Artifact
1 Islandwalk, range {T}: Add {U} or {B}. Crew 2 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 2 or greater: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)
Dark Baymax
B 3B 4 Artifact Creature - Robot Equipment Creature 4/1
2 Flying Equipped creature gets +2/+0 and flying. Reconfigure {3} ({3}: Attach to target creature you control; or unattach from a creature. Reconfigure only as a sorcery. While attached, this isn’t a creature.)
